attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who can win from reduced groups while maintaining GC position. Capitalizes on stage chaos and reduced sprinter fields rather than pure climbing attacks.
team_tactics: UAE deploys him as secondary GC threat with freedom to join breakaways when GC group is controlled. Can lead chase efforts but team conserves his energy for dual GC/stage hunting role.
terrain_preference: Punchy Basque-style climbs (performed well on Jaizkibel). Thrives in reduced breakaway scenarios on medium mountain stages. Less effective on prolonged high-mountain attrition.
vulnerability: Exposed on penultimate climbs when top GC teams (Jumbo) apply sustained attrition tactics. Lacks explosive finishing power in final 2km after bridging efforts. Top-5 GC ceiling clearly defined.
key_patterns: Fades in final 2km after leading chase/bridging efforts (UAE Tour 2022, 2023)
Opportunistic in chaotic finishes, securing bonus seconds and podiums from crashes (Giro 2022, TDF 2023)
Maintains top-5 GC while winning from breakaways, dual-threat capacity confirmed multiple times
Dropped on penultimate climbs when pure climbers apply sustained pressure, not final climbs
UAE alternative GC card when Pogačar marked, can contest podium places independently
form_trajectory: positive: Emerged as legitimate top-5 GC rider at 2023 Tour with stage win from break while holding GC position, though ceiling against Jumbo tactics confirmed
